text: Subcontractor has paid each and all of its subcontractors, laborers, suppliers, vendors and materialmen in full  for  all  labor,  materials,  equipment  and/or  services  provided  to  it  for  incorporation  in  or  use  or  work  on  the Project, which are included in its application for payment to Contractor for the period ending ________________ (the  'Pay  Period').  Subcontractor  acknowledges  that  Contractor  is  relying  on  Subcontractor's  statements  and representations herein in making payment to Subcontractor.
